questionHtml: Using the information in Table 3, calculate the inflation rate in Cameroon in 2019.
markschemeHtml:
Inflation in 2019: [(118.6 - 115.8)/115.8]×100% = 2.42%

An answer of 2.42% without workings is sufficient for [1]

meta.title: Using the information in Table 3, calculate the inflation rate in Cameroon in 2019.
breadcrumbLabels: 3.3.3 Low and stable rate of inflation
